strengths: Successfully completed the circle cut and removed the gauze piece
Maintained adequate traction throughout most of the cutting sequence
Demonstrated good instrument coordination during the cutting phases
weaknesses: Cut path deviated outside the marked circle boundary in multiple sections
Inconsistent precision when following the circular guideline
Lost cutting accuracy particularly in the middle sections of the circle

drills.name: Circle tracking quarter-cuts
drills.description: Cut the circle in four controlled quadrants while maintaining traction, pausing between each quarter to verify alignment with the circle boundary.
drills.targets_weakness: Cut path deviated outside the marked circle boundary in multiple sections.

drills.name: Traction-angle practice
drills.description: 10 repetitions of repositioning the Maryland to improve scissor entry angle and maintain consistent tension on the gauze edge.
drills.targets_weakness: Inconsistent precision when following the circular guideline.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your successful completion into precise boundary adherence. Work on maintaining consistent cutting accuracy throughout the entire circle rather than just completing the task.
